---
title: "Final_Report"
author: "Arely Salinas Cambron, Ruby Cruz, Kylize Dela Cruz, and Raquel Gonzalez"
date: "2026-04-20"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Day 1

## Task 2: Environmental Setup & Data Import 
```{r}
# Upload the NHIS 2021 dataset and codebook to the data/ folder

read.csv("C:/Users/raque/Downloads/PUBH 422/Spring26_Project2_Group4/NHIS _Data_2021.csv")
```
